creator: jhkingsr@gmail.com
text:
No worries I figured you got busy IRL. I'll try the hack and let you know... here's the pciconf from the 9.3-stable boot.

root@netsys9:/ufs/home/storm # pciconf -lc

    cap 07[90] = PCI-X bridge
    cap 08[a0] = HT MSI address window enabled at 0xfee00000
    cap 08[b0] = HT slave
    cap 0d[d8] = PCI Bridge card=0x00000000
